title: Feminist Mutual Aid & Organizing
subtitle:
Mutual aid networks and initiatives focused on building intersectional
                    feminist power, advancing gender justice, and supporting communities through collective action.

initiatives.name: The Feminist Front (FF)
initiatives.description: A youth-led organization building intergenerational feminist power through mutual aid and direct action. They combine grassroots organizing, political education, and arts-based approaches to advance gender, racial, and queer justice, with current campaigns focused on reproductive rights, the Equal Rights Amendment, and countering disinformation in immigrant and POC communities.

initiatives.name: Half the Sky
initiatives.description: Proletarian feminist organization committed to women's emancipation: dismantling imperialism, capitalism, and sexual commodification.
